title: Delta Delight
description: Add various foods and unique items from the Delta Force game
body:
Delta Delight

Introduction

Delta Delights is an add-on for Farmer's Delight for Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge, bringing foods, drinks, and (former) cocktail-making activities from Delta Force into Minecraft.

  • A variety of specialty foods and drinks, including Olivia Champagne, "Diamond" Caviar, Fragrant Fried Noodles, etc. Some high-quality foods feature exquisite models.
  • A brand new cocktail-making system that allows players to create completely unique cocktails based on different bases, ingredients, and shaking times.
  • Heart of Africa! Can you find it in diamond ore? Perhaps some villagers will buy it at a high price (really high!).

Author's Note

CandleBRT: Seriously, how is there still someone camping the extraction point with a standard crossbow?
